changeSet.author: andrew
changeSet.comment: Change sentence PRIMARY KEY from sentence_id to (sentence_id, migration_id). This allows the same sentence ID to appear in multiple migrations, which happens when the segmenter version changes but the commit hasn't changed.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE annotation_version DROP CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_version_sentence; ALTER TABLE annotation_version DROP CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_version_origin_sentence;
ALTER TABLE sentence DROP CONSTRAINT sentence_pkey;

rollback.sql:
ALTER TABLE annotation_version ADD CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_version_sentence FOREIGN KEY (sentence_id) REFERENCES sentence(sentence_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT;
ALTER TABLE annotation_version ADD CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_version_origin_sentence FOREIGN KEY (origin_sentence_id) REFERENCES sentence(sentence_id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
